cases.forum: Karnataka High Court (on appeal from a Bengaluru Commercial Court, which had refused a temporary injunction)
cases.parties: Vijay Ravindra Kirloskar and KEC Welfare Trusts vs Mohib Nomanbhai Khericha (Chairman, TDPSL) and Nikhil Kumar (MD, TDPSL, Kirloskar's nephew) and others
cases.note: Kirloskar (founder of TDPSL in 1999, also Chairman of Kirloskar Electric Company) asserts a claim over a 16% equity stake (2.51 crore shares) held by Khericha/Kumar/others. Karnataka HC granted an interim order 12 Jul 2023 restraining transfer/sale of the shares; respondents given 1 week to seek vacating it. No public update found after Aug 2023 (a separate Business Standard piece the same month described Kirloskar alleging insufficient SEBI disclosure around shareholder agreements) -- current 2026 status not independently confirmed in sources reviewed; verify before treating as resolved either way.
cases.source: Zee Business / Deccan Herald, 12-13 Jul 2023; Business Standard, 20 Aug 2023
